title: Schoenoplectus bucharicus
taxonomy: Schoenoplectus bucharicus is a species of sedge, commonly classified within the family Cyperaceae. This family consists of over 5,000 species of sedges and rushes. The genus Schoenoplectus, to which Schoenoplectus bucharicus belongs, is further divided into various species based on their morphological characteristics. Schoenoplectus bucharicus is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia, including countries such as Uzbekistan and Tajikistan. The specific classification of Schoenoplectus bucharicus may vary depending on the source and the taxonomic system used.
